name: Crayfish & Poached Quail Eggs Salad & Truffle Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. For the vinaigrette, combine truffles, shallots, dill, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Whisk together with vinegar.
2. Gradually whisk in oil until desired consistency is reached.
3. Prepare the court bouillon by coarsely chopping all vegetables. Place in a pot and cover with water. Add remaining seasonings. Cook over medium heat for 20-30 minutes. Strain.
4. Poach quail eggs in boiling water with a touch of vinegar until soft. Cool in ice water.
5. Arrange endive, chicory, poached eggs, and crayfish tails on a plate. Serve with vinaigrette on the side.
